thinking:
**Analyzing Supplier Payment Dialog**

I'm now diving into Section 2, specifically the "Fiche Versements Fournisseur" (Supplier Payment Dialog). My focus is on thoroughly understanding the specifications and requirements for mirroring the client's payment dialog.

args.CodeContent:
"# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from PySide6.QtWidgets import QDialog, QVBoxLayout, QListWidget, QListWidgetItem, QPushButton, QLineEdit
from PySide6.QtCore import Qt
from app.core.database import get_session
from app.models.supplier import Supplier

class SupplierPickerDialog(QDialog):
    def __init__(self, user, parent=None):
        super().__init__(parent)
        self.setWindowTitle("Sélectionner un Fournisseur")
        self.selected_supplier = None
        self.db_session = get_session()
        self.setMinimumSize(400, 300)
        
        layout = QVBoxLayout(self)
        self.search = QLineEdit()
        self.search.setPlaceholderText("Rechercher...")
        self.search.textChanged.connect(self._filter)
        layout.addWidget(self.search)
        
        self.list_w = QListWidget()
        suppliers = self.db_session.query(Supplier).filter(Supplier.is_deleted == 0, Supplier.is_active == 1).all()
        for s in suppliers:
            item = QListWidgetItem(f"{s.code} — {s.name}")
            item.setData(Qt.UserRole, s)
            self.list_w.addItem(item)
        layout.addWidget(self.list_w)
        
        self.list_w.itemDoubleClicked.connect(self._on_select)
        
        select_btn = QPushButton("Sélectionner")
        select_btn.clicked.connect(lambda: self._on_select(self.list_w.currentItem()) if self.list_w.currentItem() else None)
        layout.addWidget(select_btn)

    def _filter(self, text):
        for i in range(self.list_w.count()):
            it = self.list_w.item(i)
            it.setHidden(text.lower() not in it.text().lower())

    def _on_select(self, item):
        self.selected_supplier = item.data(Qt.UserRole)
        self.accept()
"
args.Description: "A minimal temporary supplier picker dialog to support the supplier payment dialog before Section 4 overhauls it."
